sections.section_job: Lead with the line that melts a parent: before you were even born, God loved you first.
sections.voice_anchor: before you were even born, god loved you first
sections.anti_pattern_to_avoid: Do not over-explain or theologize the hero line. Let it land. No forced enthusiasm, no exclamation marks, no 'welcome to ParaTots!' cheer.

sections.section_job: Reassure parents: the room is safe, the day is gentle, and there is a Parents Room where they can breathe.
sections.voice_anchor: Let delight show up in the details. Do not force enthusiasm.
sections.anti_pattern_to_avoid: Do not perform safety with bullet-point compliance language (ratios, badges). Reassure in plain, parent-to-parent voice.

atom_assignments.drafter_hint: Voice anchor — write the body in this register; do not quote the rule itself.

sections.section_job: Logistics: ages 0-4, Saturdays 9:15, Teacher Donna coordinating.
sections.anti_pattern_to_avoid: Do not bury the time + audience in prose. The when/who/where should be findable in two seconds.

sections.section_job: Join us at 9:15, then stay for the 10:00 gathering together.
sections.anti_pattern_to_avoid: Do not say 'don't miss it' or use urgency. Invitation, not pressure.

sections.section_job: Close on solidarity: we are all in this mystery of parenting together.
sections.voice_anchor: Kids are loud in the lobby and welcome to be.
sections.anti_pattern_to_avoid: Do not end on a sales CTA or another logistics block. End on the human note — parents alongside parents.

unresolved_inputs.what: No atom body exists for the logistics section — the allocation routed facts (service_time, staff, program, ministry) which are not in the atoms_for_page list. Drafter should compose items[] from facts: ages 0-4, Saturdays 9:15 AM, 51 W Olive Redlands, Teacher Donna (Donna Hadley) coordinating.
No atom for the invite CTA — drafter should compose from page context: invite to ParaTots at 9:15 then the 10:00 gathering. Primary button targets /plan-a-visit or program URL.

No atom for the closing solidarity note — drafter should compose a single-sentence close in the established voice (parents alongside parents, mystery of parenting together). Optional single button to contact Teacher Donna at info@paradoxredlands.com.
